name: hope
description: Develop Hope through an independent harness and shared Codex and Claude Code skills. Requires Node.js 20 or newer. Diff is being rebuilt.

interface.longDescription: Hope separates an independent harness from Codex and Claude Code entry points over the same feature code. Node.js 20 or newer is required. Hope diff is currently unavailable while it is rebuilt from its shared product definition.
defaultPrompt: Use $hope:diff to check the current Hope diff rebuild status.
